title: Cankaya Cold Snap
lead: A cold snap is affecting Cankaya with unusual temperatures. The Z-Score of -1.50 indicates a significant deviation from the norm.
body:
The current weather conditions in Cankaya are characterized by a score of 5.0/10, indicating a moderate cold snap. 
 The heating degree days (HDD) are at 3.0 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, resulting in increased heating demands. 
 The relative humidity is at 60% with no wind, making the cold temperatures feel more intense.
conclusion: Monitoring of the situation is recommended to assess potential further deviations from the norm.
